nodes.x: The sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
¶ And the sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Pharez, and Zerah: but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Pharez were Hezron and Hamul.
And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.
The sons, I say, of Reuben the firstborn of Israel were, Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
And the sons of Reuben; Hanoch, and Phallu, and Hezron, and Carmi.
And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
And the sons of Shimei were, Jahath, Zina, and Jeush, and Beriah. These four were the sons of Shimei.
The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.
The sons of Salma; Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
And these were of the father of Etam; Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash: and the name of their sister was Hazelelponi:
And these are the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebajoth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
¶ And these were the sons of Aholibamah, the daughter of Anah the daughter of Zibeon, Esau’s wife: and she bare to Esau Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.
¶ These are their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Beth-lehem.
¶ And the sons of Benjamin were Belah, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.
And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.
And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,
And these are their names: The son of Hur, in mount Ephraim:
¶ And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,
¶ And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.
And Machir took to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maachah;) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.
And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,
And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
And Aholibamah bare Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah: these are the sons of Esau, which were born unto him in the land of Canaan.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Helah were, Zereth, and Jezoar, and Ethnan.
And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
And Coz begat Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
¶ And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.

And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me! And God granted him that which he requested.

Jacob, previous to his^eath, gathered his sons together! and 'blessed them one H bygone. The great blessing pronounced jbpon the head of Josepn?yvas, that he should^inherit the blessings of the breasts and" of, the womb, anjl thus become a multitude ‘^nations, so numerous as to cause him to 1 need a muchLlargefr extent of country than his brethren. ,
And he said unto him, What is thy name? And he said, Jacob.

following  are  examples:  "Jesus"  meaning  Savior  (Matt.  1:21; 
Luke  1:31);  "John,"  signifying  Jehovah's  gift,  specifically  applied 
to  the  Baptist,  who  was  sent  to  earth  to  prepare  the  way  for 
Jehovah's  coming  in  the  flesh  (Luke  i  :i3)  ;  "Ishmael,"  signifying 
God  shall  hear  him …

And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may…
And God spake unto Israel in the visions of the night, and said, Jacob, Jacob. And he said, Here am I.

¶ And say unto them, Thus saith the Lord God; In the day when I chose Israel, and lifted up mine hand unto the seed of the house of Jacob, and made myself known unto them in the land of Egypt, when I lifted up mine hand unto them, saying, I am the Lord your God;
And said unto them, Thus saith the Lord, the God of Israel, unto whom ye sent me to present your supplication before him;
Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Now will I bring again the captivity of Jacob, and have mercy upon the whole house of Israel, and will be jealous for my holy name;
¶ And Chelub the brother of Shuah begat Mehir, which was the father of Eshton.
The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
And Eshton begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;
And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
And Eshton begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
And of the sons of Pahath-moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
And Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, which is Debir,
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,
And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.
And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea, and Ahaz.
And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.
And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,
And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And these are ancient things.
And he conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah, and with Abiathar the priest: and they following Adonijah helped him.
And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite, and Joshua the son of Nun: for they have wholly followed the Lord.
And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
And of the sons of Elam; Jeshaiah the son of Athaliah, and with him seventy males.
And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
And Gath, and Mareshah, and Ziph,
And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
And these are the sons of Reuel; Nahath, and Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah: these were the sons of Bashemath Esau’s wife.
And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.
And his wife Jehudijah bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered took.
Which bare him children; Jeush, and Shamariah, and Zaham.
Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.
And the sons of his wife Hodiah the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.
And the prince of the tribe of the children of Naphtali, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.
And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.
¶ The sons of Shelah the son of Judah were, Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea,
And the sons of Judah after their families were; of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites: of Pharez, the family of the Pharzites: of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites.

And at Jerusalem dwelt certain of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin. Of the children of Judah; Athaiah the son of Uzziah, the son of Zechariah, the son of Amariah, the son of Shephatiah, the son of Mahalaleel, of the children of Perez;

¶ The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the Lord; and he slew him.
And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
Also unto Shemaiah his son were sons born, that ruled throughout the house of their father: for they were mighty men of valour.
And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And these are ancient things.
And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.
These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plants and hedges: there they dwelt with the king for his work.
Now, the servants of the nobleman went and did as their lord commanded them, and planted the olive trees, and built a hedge round about, and set watchmen, and began to build a tower.
And the king commanded, and they brought great stones, costly stones, and hewed stones, to lay the foundation of the house.
Whose leaves were fair, and the fruit thereof much, and in it was meat for all; under which the beasts of the field dwelt, and upon whose branches the fowls of the heaven had their habitation:
And the enemy came by night, and broke down the hedge; and the servants of the nobleman arose and were affrighted, and fled; and the enemy destroyed their works, and broke down the olive trees.

46. Now, the servants of the nobleman went and did as their lord
    commanded them; and planted the olive trees, and built a hedge
    round about, and set watchmen, and began to build a tower.
¶ The sons of Simeon were, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul:
And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman: these are the families of Simeon.
¶ And the sons of Simeon; Jemuel, and Jamin, and Ohad, and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanitish woman.
And of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
¶ The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites: of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites: of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites:
Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
And Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him, and smote him before the people, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.
The son of Shallum, the son of Zadok, the son of Ahitub,
And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.
And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
And Noah begat three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.
The tenth to Shimei, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:
And all Judah stood before the Lord, with their little ones, their wives, and their children.
And there were born unto him seven sons and three daughters.
And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual,
And Hazar-shual, and Beer-sheba, and Bizjothjah,
And at Hazar-shual, and at Beer-sheba, and in the villages thereof,
And they had in their inheritance Beer-sheba, or Sheba, and Moladah,
And Hazar-shual, and Balah, and Azem,
Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.
And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
And at En-rimmon, and at Zareah, and at Jarmuth,
And at Jeshua, and at Moladah, and at Beth-phelet,
And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual,
And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
And at Ziklag, and at Mekonah, and in the villages thereof,
And Ziklag, and Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susah,
And at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-birei, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.
And Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:
And Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
And David was then in an hold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Beth-lehem.
And Iron, and Migdal-el, Horem, and Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.
And they buried him in the city of David among the kings, because he had done good in Israel, both toward God, and toward his house.
And their villages were, Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:
Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:
And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities are twenty and nine, with their villages:
And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Beth-lehem: twelve cities with their villages.
And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:
And all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogy.
And all the villages that were round about these cities to Baalath-beer, Ramath of the south. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.

And Baalath, and all the store cities that Solomon had, and all the chariot cities, and the cities of the horsemen, and all that Solomon desired to build in Jerusalem, and in Lebanon, and throughout all the land of his dominion.
And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.
And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,
And Nebo, and Baal-meon, (their names being changed,) and Shibmah: and gave other names unto the cities which they builded.
And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah,
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.
And Azariah, Ezra, and Meshullam,
And Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
And Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,
And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphalet.
And Zechariah, and Aziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, and Eliab, and Maaseiah, and Benaiah, with psalteries on Alamoth;
And Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;
And Maaseiah the son of Baruch, the son of Col-hozeh, the son of Hazaiah, the son of Adaiah, the son of Joiarib, the son of Zechariah, the son of Shiloni.
These mentioned by their names were princes in their families: and the house of their fathers increased greatly.
That the princes of Israel, heads of the house of their fathers, who were the princes of the tribes, and were over them that were numbered, offered:
And those that were numbered of the sons of Gershon, throughout their families, and by the house of their fathers,
And with him ten princes, of each chief house a prince throughout all the tribes of Israel; and each one was an head of the house of their fathers among the thousands of Israel.
¶ And those that were numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, throughout their families, by the house of their fathers,
These are the sons of Ishmael, and these are their names, by their towns, and by their castles; twelve princes according to their nations.
¶ And they went to the entrance of Gedor, even unto the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.
And it came to pass that they departed out of the valley, and took their journey into the wilderness.
¶ And they took their journey from Succoth, and encamped in Etham, in the edge of the wilderness.
And they turned and went up into the mountain, and came unto the valley of Eshcol, and searched it out.
They drop upon the pastures of the wilderness: and the little hills rejoice on every side.
And they found fat pasture and good, and the land was wide, and quiet, and peaceable; for they of Ham had dwelt there of old.
For their riches were more than that they might dwell together; and the land wherein they were strangers could not bear them because of their cattle.
They shewed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.

And they took strong cities, and a fat land, and possessed houses full of all goods, wells digged, vineyards, and oliveyards, and fruit trees in abundance: so they did eat, and were filled, and became fat, and delighted themselves in thy great goodness.
They took their sheep, and their oxen, and their asses, and that which was in the city, and that which was in the field,
And it came to pass that they began to prosper by degrees in the land, and began to raise grain more abundantly, and flocks, and herds, that they did not suffer with hunger.
And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents, and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their…
And the king of Babylon smote them, and slew them at Riblah in the land of Hamath. So Judah was carried away out of their land.
And the king of Babylon smote them, and put them to death in Riblah in the land of Hamath. Thus Judah was carried away captive out of his own land.
And Judah was put to the worse before Israel; and they fled every man to their tents.
They smote also the tents of cattle, and carried away sheep and camels in abundance, and returned to Jerusalem.
And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.
And some of them, even of the sons of Simeon, five hundred men, went to mount Seir, having for their captains Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Ishi.

[paragraph continues] Judah went forth in front, and Naphtali and Gad with him and fifty servants with him on the south side of the tower, and they slew all they found before them, and not one individual of them escaped. 6. And Levi and Dan and Asher went forth on the east side of the tower, and fifty (men) with them, and they slew the fighting men of Moab and Ammon. 7. And Reuben and Issachar…

And he gathered all Judah and Benjamin, and the strangers with them out of Ephraim and Manasseh, and out of Simeon: for they fell to him out of Israel in abundance, when they saw that the Lord his God was with him.
And they smote the rest of the Amalekites that were escaped, and dwelt there unto this day.
Then the Amalekites came down, and the Canaanites which dwelt in that hill, and smote them, and discomfited them, even unto Hormah.
And they returned, and came to En-mishpat, which is Kadesh, and smote all the country of the Amalekites, and also the Amorites, that dwelt in Hazezon-tamar.

And the Amalekites were not converted, save only one; neither were any of the Amulonites; but they did harden their hearts, and also the hearts of the Lamanites in that part of the land wheresoever they dwelt, yea, and all their villages and all their cities.

And the Lord delivered them into the hand of Israel, who smote them, and chased them unto great Zidon, and unto Misrephoth-maim, and unto the valley of Mizpeh eastward; and they smote them, until they left them none remaining.
And he gathered an host, and smote the Amalekites, and delivered Israel out of the hands of them that spoiled them.
